derivation_source: Generated from the canonical live-book source using `python3 scripts/render_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx` after source commit 855dc277a6990bd3e98ab1eb5d363986a563f5dd. The approved artifact is the local generated reader HTML snapshot only.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx; python3 scripts/inspect_reader_format_artifacts.py; node scripts/validate_reader_html_artifact_browser.js --strict
artifact_formats.notes: Reviewed local ignored reader HTML snapshot with deterministic directory digest f2b98bdb82c1c42cfe7d8bc85e63ce5ed06b45d29c8023d4948cd039599a4dfa over 81 files. Browser review opened 59 generated pages at desktop and mobile widths for 118 page-view pairs with 0 failures.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx; python3 scripts/inspect_reader_format_artifacts.py
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered and structurally inspected only. EPUB is not release-approved because e-reader application review remains open.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: python3 scripts/render_reader_formats.py --formats html epub docx; python3 scripts/inspect_reader_format_artifacts.py
artifact_formats.notes: Rendered and structurally inspected only. DOCX is not release-approved because full Word, LibreOffice GUI, or Google Docs application review remains open.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 python3 scripts/render_reader_formats.py --output build/reader_edition_pdf_probe_utf8 --formats pdf
artifact_formats.notes: PDF has a prior UTF-8 probe and representative spot checks, but full page-by-page layout review remains open and PDF is not release-approved.
Audio is deferred to v1.x and is not part of this reader HTML release record.

review_status.notes: Generated reader chapter-text review is complete for all 54 chapters, the reader continuity audit has 0 high-priority rows, the reader spine validator passes, and the HTML browser artifact review passed all pages and viewports. Audio was not reviewed or released.

reader_manuscript.review_notes: Generated reader source has 54 chapter files plus front matter and selected appendices. The HTML artifact derived from it passed structural and browser artifact review; curated reader manuscript graduation remains deferred.

audio_package.review_notes: No audio package is produced or approved by this reader HTML release record.

companion_material.review_notes: Companion-note routing is tracked for dense proof/governance chapters, but companion notes are not released as a separate artifact here and do not replace meaning-critical prose in the reader spine.

human_consumption_gate.notes: The approved human-consumption artifact for this record is generated reader HTML only. HTML received full local browser review across all generated pages and viewports. EPUB remains preferred for future e-reader use but is not approved here.

audiobook_gate.notes: Audiobook, MP3, M4B, and audio-embedded EPUB work is deferred and not released by this record.

release_notes: This record closes the v1.0 human-reader artifact gate for one reviewed local reader HTML artifact. It does not publish EPUB, DOCX, PDF, audio, or e-reader artifacts and does not change the live AI/research book's claim, source, proof, or evidence authority.
residuals: The reviewed HTML artifact is a local ignored build snapshot, not a GitHub Pages deployment artifact.
EPUB remains rendered and structurally inspected only; e-reader application review remains open.
DOCX remains rendered and structurally inspected only; full Word, LibreOffice GUI, or Google Docs review remains open.
PDF remains a probe with representative spot checks; full page-by-page layout review remains open.
No audio artifact, audio script review, MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB is approved.
Curated parallel reader-manuscript graduation remains deferred to v1.x unless later promoted.
non_claims: does not approve EPUB, DOCX, PDF, e-reader, audio, or audio-embedded EPUB artifacts
does not publish a reader artifact to GitHub Pages or an external archive
does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
does not prove ASI capability, model quality, deployment readiness, runtime safety, benchmark performance, or source interpretation
does not create a DOI, Zenodo archive, audiobook, or final print artifact
